---
title: "Clinical Trial Regulatory Review Notebook"
subtitle: "ICH E9(R1) Alignment & Statistical Review Layer"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

## 1. ICH E9(R1) Estimand Framework

To align this regulatory assessment with modern structural guidelines, the primary evaluation architecture is defined using the four interconnected attributes of an **estimand**:

* **A. Population:** The Full Analysis Set (FAS), defined as all randomized subjects who received at least one dose of study medication.
* **B. Variable (Endpoint):** Time-to-first-event (days from treatment start date to the onset of the primary targeted adverse event).
* **C. Intercurrent Events:** Discontinuation of treatment. We apply a **Treatment-Policy Strategy**, tracking all events regardless of treatment adherence.
* **D. Summary Measure:** The Hazard Ratio (HR) derived via a semi-parametric Cox Proportional Hazards model.

---

## 2. Regulatory Auditor Review Engine

The following unified analytical chunk processes the core regulatory questions regarding baseline balance, serious adverse event concentrations, and primary efficacy survival modeling.

```{r regulatory_review_engine, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(gt)
library(haven)
library(survival)

# ==============================================================================
# DATA LOADING & PATHING
# ==============================================================================
adsl_path <- "../data/adam/adsl.xpt"
if(!file.exists(adsl_path)) adsl_path = "data/adam/adsl.xpt"
if(!file.exists(adsl_path)) adsl_path = "../adsl.xpt"  # <-- FIX: Finds it one folder up on GitHub
if(!file.exists(adsl_path)) adsl_path = "adsl.xpt"

adae_path <- "../data/adam/adae.xpt"
if(!file.exists(adae_path)) adae_path = "data/adam/adae.xpt"
if(!file.exists(adae_path)) adae_path = "../adae.xpt"  # <-- FIX: Finds it one folder up on GitHub
if(!file.exists(adae_path)) adae_path = "adae.xpt"

# Read and safely protect treatment column mappings
adsl <- read_xpt(adsl_path)
if(!"ARM" %in% names(adsl)) {
  if("TRTP" %in% names(adsl)) {
    adsl <- adsl %>% rename(ARM = TRTP)
  } else if("TRTA" %in% names(adsl)) {
    adsl <- adsl %>% rename(ARM = TRTA)
  }
}

# ==============================================================================
# QUESTION A: BASELINE BALANCE
# ==============================================================================
baseline_summary <- adsl %>%
  group_by(ARM) %>%
  summarise(
    `Total N` = n(),
    `Mean Age (SD)` = paste0(round(mean(AGE, na.rm = TRUE), 1), " (", round(sd(AGE, na.rm = TRUE), 1), ")"),
    `Female (%)` = paste0(round(sum(SEX == "F", na.rm = TRUE) / n() * 100, 1), "%"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("\n--- QUESTION A: DEMOGRAPHICS MATRIX ---\n")
print(baseline_summary)


# ==============================================================================
# QUESTION B: SERIOUS ADVERSE EVENTS (SAE) CONCENTRATION
# ==============================================================================
if(file.exists(adae_path)) {
  adae <- read_xpt(adae_path)
  
  # Protect safety analysis column mappings
  if(!"TRTA" %in% names(adae)) {
    if("ARM" %in% names(adae)) {
      adae <- adae %>% rename(TRTA = ARM)
    } else if("TRTP" %in% names(adae)) {
      adae <- adae %>% rename(TRTA = TRTP)
    }
  }
  
  sae_summary <- adae %>%
    filter(AESER == "Y") %>%
    group_by(TRTA) %>%
    summarise(
      `Total SAE Count` = n(),
      `Unique Subjects with SAEs` = n_distinct(USUBJID),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  cat("\n--- QUESTION B: SAE SUMMARY LAYER ---\n")
  print(sae_summary)
} else {
  cat("\nWARNING: ADAE dataset missing. Skipping Question B output.\n")
}


# ==============================================================================
# QUESTION C: TREATMENT BENEFIT (COX PROPORTIONAL HAZARDS)
# ==============================================================================
survival_data <- adsl %>%
  mutate(
    status = ifelse(!is.na(TRTEDT), 1, 0),
    time_days = as.numeric(difftime(coalesce(TRTEDT, max(TRTEDT, na.rm=TRUE)), TRTSDT, units = "days")),
    time_days = ifelse(time_days <= 0, 1, time_days)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(time_days))

cox_fit <- coxph(Surv(time_days, status) ~ ARM, data = survival_data)

cat("\n--- QUESTION C: COX REGRESSION SURVIVAL ANALYSIS SUMMARY ---\n")
print(summary(cox_fit))
